citation.description: Guides packaged under rebar._guides; explain_guide() reads via importlib.resources.files so it works without docs/ tree; wheel ships packages=["src/rebar"] covering the entire tree

criteria.criterion: AC (1): rebar explain works in a consumer install

citation.description: plan_review_status() is a pure local read (no LLM, no network). CLI --status flag at _llm_commands.py:459-486 returns exit 0 (current) or 12 (stale/absent). Documented at docs/plan-review-gate.md lines 394-421 under 'Checking currency cheaply' and in cli-reference.md

criteria.criterion: AC (2): a read-only, no-LLM currency query exists and is documented

citation.description: _render_plan_review_text() checks coverage.idempotent_skip and prints 'reused: existing attestation is still current — no LLM re-run (pass --force to re-review)' in text mode

criteria.criterion: AC (3): the idempotence short-circuit is visible in text output

citation.description: Section 'Attestation, freshness & invalidation' (lines 357-387) enumerates the 5-check binding/invalidation rule. Section 'audit show is a history view, not a status view' (lines 423-432) explicitly states plan_reviews is retained REVIEW_RESULT sidecar history, not the current signed attestation, with a direct pointer to --status for currency.

criteria.criterion: AC (4): an attestation-lifecycle doc states the binding/invalidation rule and that audit show is a history not a status view
